allow: Bash(node -e "const pl = require\('./locales/pl.json'\); console.log\('pl keys:', Object.keys\(pl\).join\(', '\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const en = require\('./locales/en.json'\); console.log\('en keys:', Object.keys\(en\).join\(', '\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/dev/stdin','utf8'\); const p=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('i18n-js:', p.dependencies['i18n-js']\); console.log\('async-storage:', p.dependencies['@react-native-async-storage/async-storage']\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const p=JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('/proc/stdin','utf8'\)\); console.log\('main:', p.main\); console.log\('module:', p.module\); console.log\('exports:', JSON.stringify\(p.exports, null, 2\)\)")
Bash(node -p "const p=require\('./node_modules/i18n-js/package.json'\); JSON.stringify\({main:p.main, module:p.module, exports: p.exports}, null, 2\)")

Bash(node -e "const en=require\('./locales/en.json'\); const keys=Object.keys\(en.personalityResult.types\); console.log\('Types in en.json:', keys.join\(', '\)\); console.log\('Count:', keys.length\)")
Bash(node -e "const pl=require\('./locales/pl.json'\); console.log\('pl.common:', JSON.stringify\(pl.common\)\); console.log\('pl.nav:', JSON.stringify\(pl.nav\)\);")
